# function: extract_idp_origin

Parses the Origin a SAML 2.0 Identity Provider and returns the value.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# This will return a string value
output "idp_origin" {
  value = provider::custom::extract_idp_origin(data.custom_destination_saml_metadata.subaccount_gateway.idp_metadata)
  sensitive   = true
  description = "SAML 2.0 IdP Origin"
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
extract_idp_origin(idp_metadata string) string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `idp_metadata` (String) Identity Provider Metadata as base64-encoded string
